positive: A stylish, minimalist depiction of a golden retriever puppy playing in a vibrant field of wildflowers at dawn. The silhouette should be clean and highly contrasted against a gradient background of soft orange, deep indigo, and pale lavender. Use a clean line art style with watercolor wash overlays to fill the solid areas. Central composition, volumetric lighting, vector art quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blur, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, complex background, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs, grainy
